tracks.speaker: Ben

tracks.speaker: Nora

tracks.text: The viewer imagines being in the situation.

tracks.speaker: Leo
tracks.text: At first, I tried to translate every word.

tracks.speaker: Nora
tracks.audio_path: audio/L44-02 - BR1442 - Nora - Now you understand whole phrases.mp3

tracks.speaker: Leo
tracks.text: Yeah. Expressions like 'let me know' feel natural now.

tracks.audio_path: audio/L44-03 - BR1443 - Leo - Yeah. Expressions like 'let me know' feel natural now.mp3

tracks.speaker: Ben
tracks.audio_path: audio/L44-05 - BR1445 - Ben - Keep practicing with real conversations.mp3
